claim: Project Telos has a ninth-wave source-federation package for biology, medicine, robotics, source-lead demotion, and hard-problem reduction, with Crucible v2 matching package-boundary claims while leaving biomedical, clinical, protein-design, robotics-safety, paper-truth, and grand-challenge claims unproven.
scope: Local ninth-wave documentation and receipt package only. This is not clinical evidence, wet-lab evidence, physical-robot validation, protein-design validation, paper acceptance, exhaustive literature coverage, or a solved grand-challenge claim.

checks.name: source-federation package exists
checks.evidence: docs/outreach/NINTH-WAVE-BIO-MED-ROBOTICS-SOURCE-FEDERATION-2026-07-02.md is present and records four arXiv source-lead stores.

checks.name: hard-problem registry exists
checks.evidence: docs/research/FRONTIER-HARD-PROBLEM-REGISTRY-2026-07-02.md is present and separates frontier problems from near-term subproblem packets.

checks.name: source-lead demotion gate exists
checks.evidence: docs/outreach/receipts/ninth-wave/source-lead-demotion-gate.json records 30 retained rows as 15 domain_lead, 9 adjacent_lead, and 6 query_noise.

checks.name: Crucible v2 package-boundary assessment matches
checks.evidence: docs/outreach/receipts/ninth-wave-tooling-run-v2-2026-07-02.json reports 6 MATCH, 0 DRIFT, 0 UNVERIFIABLE, with assessment seal 28f654ff9ab35789896f4f72de5b5e7cb1e48824772e74a66111db2e101cb5f2.

checks.name: official-copy working draft preserves domain boundaries
checks.evidence: docs/research/whitepapers/BIO-MED-ROBOTICS-SOURCE-FEDERATION-2026-07-02.md marks package-boundary Crucible status while keeping substantive domain claims unverified.

checks.name: public-copy queue preserves do-not-claim boundaries
checks.evidence: docs/outreach/NINTH-WAVE-CONTENT-QUEUE-2026-07-02.md frames posts as research/tooling updates, not domain discoveries.

boundary: This packet teaches a bounded local package claim. It does not teach or assert that any biomedical, clinical, protein-design, robotics, physics, or mathematics problem has been solved.
